week1_summary: • The TC-like vortex (TCLV) formed into TC HENRY inside the PAR has moved over the northwestern boundary of the PMD; • Moreover, TCLV (1) is forecast to emerge over the eastern boundary of the TCID and is expected to traverse the northern part of the Philippine Sea (inside the PAR) with a moderate to high likelihood of TC development during week-1.
week2_summary: • Forecasts suggest that TCLV (2) will move towards extreme Northern Luzon with a moderate to high probability of TC development; • In addition, a TCLV (3) will likely develop over the eastern boundaries of the TCID and TCAD with a low likelihood of TC formation over week-2.
conclusion: Therefore, the TC-THREAT POTENTIAL IS HIGHLY LIKELYover the next two weeks.
